title: The Singing Plate
summary: In an acoustician's parlor after midnight, a bowed brass plate sings luminous sand into resonance figures.
notes: Chladni standing-wave physics; sand gathers on real nodal lines. Three diegetic drift exits (night window, door seam, jar of luminous sand) plus a hidden fourth planned at the worn notch. Audio synthesized in Web Audio, gated behind first interaction; ElevenLabs one-shots may sweeten the gong.

admin.notes: Idea #7 from Claude's Ideas.md, selected by James 2026-07-10. Draft until James approves publication.
